# interlink_elan_services (Data Source)

Detailed view of Flex Ethernet (ELAN) endpoint services, including their virtual network and billable components.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `services` (Attributes List) ELAN endpoint services. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services))

<a id="nestedatt--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services`

Read-Only:

- `components` (Attributes List) Billable components that make up this service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services--components))
- `created_date` (String) Service creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `customer_gid` (String) Global identifier of the customer that owns this service.
- `description` (String) Optional free-text service description.
- `id` (Number) Internal numeric service ID.
- `location` (String) Name of the primary location for this service.
- `locations` (List of String) Names of the other locations (endpoints) in the same virtual network.
- `mrc` (String) Monthly recurring charge, formatted for display (e.g. `€75.00`).
- `name` (String) Human-readable service name.
- `product` (String) Name of the product this service is an instance of.
- `response_type` (String) Service type discriminator (e.g. `IPTransit`, `FlexTunnel`, `DdosProtection`).
- `service_speed` (Number) Service speed in Mbps.
- `sid` (String) Service identifier (e.g. `SID1194`).
- `status` (String) Current service status.
- `term` (Number) Contract term in months.
- `virtual_network_name` (String) Name of the virtual network this endpoint belongs to.
- `vlan_id` (Number) VLAN ID, if tagged.

<a id="nestedatt--services--components"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services.components`

Read-Only:

- `component_type` (String) Component type discriminator.
- `name` (String) Human-readable component name.
- `price` (String) Component price, formatted for display.
- `response_type` (String) Component subtype (e.g. `LAG`, `BillingGroup`, `VLAN`).
